description: Composition Blue jeans made of 100% cotton, has pockets on the sides with a patch pocket inside the right one, two pockets at the back, a looped waist, button and zipper closure on the front, and has contrast colour stitch detailing Fitting Slim Fit; Regular rise Wash care Wash inside out at 40 degrees separately Do not iron or dry clean Durable, versatile, uniquely designed and reasonably priced, this washed slim fit jeans from locomotive is designed for the man with a high fashion casual attitude. Crafted from durable cotton fabric, this denim trouser is here to stay and offer exemplary comfort for years on end. Pair it with semi-formal shirts or t-shirts, and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
